description: Main window. Grants no plugin permissions: every native call this app makes is an app command in src/commands.rs, and app commands are not brokered by the ACL. The scaffolded core:default + opener:default this replaced exposed roughly a hundred plugin commands over IPC that no line of frontend code ever called, including the opener plugin, which only Rust uses. Add a permission here when the frontend starts calling a plugin directly, and add it to ALLOWED_PERMISSIONS in scripts/check-security.mjs in the same commit so the grant is reviewed rather than absorbed.
